title: SUCCESS: Installed official Amp CLI 0.0.1782062050-gbe2b79 on local Igor’s MacBook Pro and ssh macmini; created...
content: What worked: Installed official Amp CLI 0.0.1782062050-gbe2b79 on local Igor’s MacBook Pro and ssh macmini; created ~/.local/bin/amp-yolo wrapper using ~/.config/amp/yolo-settings.json; verified command exists on both hosts; permission evaluator for Bash rm -rf /tmp/amp-permission-test-nonexistent changed to action=allow via user tool wildcard rule; simulator LaunchAgent guard verified run interval 60s on both hosts.
